exit_codes.1: comparison found changed pixels when --fail-on-diff was used

recommended_commands.purpose: Compare two generated PNGs and write a diff image
recommended_commands.command: pixel-space-assets compare baseline.png current.png --diff-output reports/pixel-diff.png --format json

recommended_commands.purpose: Compare two generated PNG directories and write matching diff images
recommended_commands.command: pixel-space-assets compare-dir baseline/ferric generated/ferric --diff-output-dir reports/ferric-diffs --format json
